content:
Prayer generates feelings and creates a desire in the heart to meet the Guru. Whenever one prays, the mind should focus on the one being prayed to. The mind should not wander here and there. For example, if one prays to the Guru, then during that time, the mind should remain entirely on the Guru. The mind, which normally remains downward, focused on the world and the senses of the body, rises upward toward the Guru.

Prayer should be remembered and practiced by everyone. If the prayer is made with the sentiment of separation (virah), it becomes even more effective, and purer feelings are awakened.
title: The Essence of Prayer

content:
At the Feet of Gurudev, We Offer Countless Salutations
At the feet of Gurudev, we offer countless salutations.
Help me sail across the ocean of life, as you have guided so many others safely before me.
I am your child, O Abhud, and you are our capable Father.
Embrace me in your lap, O Giver, your arms outstretched to support me.
Though the flames of worldly troubles strike me,
Your cool, nectar-like stream continues to soothe me.
When storms shake me, when the cold trembles through me,
The smile on your lips gives me great support.

Sometimes you lift your arms, sometimes you chant the great mantra.
I am overwhelmed with joy, O Master, for I find immense support.
If only this glimpse of your divine form could always be with me, O Master,
I would consider it my greatest fortune; even your curiosity for us is a blessing.
I bow repeatedly, lowering my head at your feet.
Now, I shall surely reach the other shore, for the paddle has been entrusted by the Guru.
At the feet of Gurudev, we offer countless salutations.
Help me sail across the ocean of life, as you have guided so many others safely before me.
title: At the Feet of Gurudev, We Offer Countless Salutations

content:
You alone are the support, O Satguru, you alone are the support.

Until I meet you in my life, where can I find peace in my mind?
I search the whole world, O Satguru, you alone are the support.

When darkness spreads across the world, then flows the stream of light.
Come to your door, O Satguru, you alone are the support.

No matter how lost one may be in life, until one finds your shelter,
Crossing the ocean of worldly existence is impossible, O Satguru, you alone are the support.

O Lord! In your various forms, you save us from the pits of worldly suffering.
O Supreme, Generous Satguru, you alone are the support.

We have come to your door, remove all our sufferings and sorrows.
O Jai Gurudev, Compassionate Satguru, you alone are the support.
title: You Alone Are the Support, O Satguru

content:
What have you brought into this world, and what will you take away?
Think carefully, O foolish mind, in the end, you will regret.

Why have you become lost in the pomp and show of this world?
Wealth, possessions, honor, prestige—why do you feel proud on gaining them?
Money, riches, and treasures will remain here after you leave.
Think carefully, O foolish mind, in the end, you will regret.

Brothers, friends, and loved ones will accompany you only up to the cremation ground.
After shedding a few selfish tears, they will return home.
No one will truly be your companion; only Death will take you away.
Think carefully, O foolish mind, in the end, you will regret.

Your body, as precious as gold, will soon be burnt away.
The woman to whom you hold affection will also frighten you one day.
She may remember you for a month, but soon you will be forgotten.
Think carefully, O foolish mind, in the end, you will regret.

Kings, paupers, priests, and scholars—all must depart one day.
Open your eyes, O wanderer, this world is only a place for temporary travel.
Only the name of Jai Gurudev will truly stand by you in the end.
Think carefully, O foolish mind, in the end, you will regret.

What have you brought into this world, and what will you take away?
Think carefully, O foolish mind, in the end, you will regret.
title: What Have You Brought Into This World, and What Will You Take Away?

content:
Satguru Satnam, We Offer You Millions of Salutations

Satguru Satnam, we offer you millions of salutations…
Millions of suns, moons, and stars shine in every particle of our being.

Satpurush Kartar, we offer you millions of salutations…
Billions of suns, moons, and stars illuminate every fiber of our body.

Alag Purush Kartar, we offer you millions of salutations…
Trillions of suns, moons, and stars radiate light in every part of us.

Agam Purush Kartar, we offer you millions of salutations…
The deep blue skies, moons, suns, and stars shine in every cell of our being.

Anami Purush Kartar, we offer you millions of salutations…
Jai Gurudev Dayal, we offer you millions of salutations…
title: Satguru Satnam, We Offer You Millions of Salutations
